case_title: STEVEN TRUONG VS. DSI LOGISTIC INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (SENT TO MARK RUSSELL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRUONG, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT DSI LOGISTIC INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED FEB-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DSI LOGISTIC INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-22-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF STEVEN TRUONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE AS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS DID NOT SIGN THE CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: PAUL ALVARADO; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,350.00 FILED BY TRUONG, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT DSI LOGISTIC INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
